Description: Critical CVEs remain unpatched beyond SLA window exposing systems to exploitation

Description: Third-party vendors retain persistent system access without periodic access certification

Description: MFA not enforced for all privileged accounts and remote access sessions

Description: No formal data classification scheme in place; staff unaware of data handling requirements
